recommendations.title: I'm Thinking of Ending Things
recommendations.overview: Nothing is as it seems when a woman experiencing misgivings about her new boyfriend joins him on a road trip to meet his parents at their remote farm.

recommendations.title: Shimmer Lake
recommendations.overview: Shot in reverse day-by-day through a week—a local sheriff embarks on a quest to unlock the mystery of three small-town criminals and a bank heist gone wrong.

recommendations.title: Rust Creek
recommendations.overview: When an overachieving college senior makes a wrong turn, her road trip becomes a life-changing fight for survival in rural Kentucky.

recommendations.title: Rabid Dogs
recommendations.overview: Following a bungled robbery, three violent criminals take a young woman, a middle-aged man, and a child hostage and force them to drive them outside Rome to help them make a clean getaway.

recommendations.title: Tiger House
recommendations.overview: A young gymnast battles a group of bank robbers at the home of her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: War of the Worlds: The Attack
recommendations.overview: Three young astronomers fight to survive a deadly Martian invasion.

recommendations.title: Charlie Countryman
recommendations.overview: A young American falls hard for a Romanian cellist whose father has recently died -- and whose violent past could bring about his own demise.

recommendations.title: Nowhere
recommendations.overview: A young pregnant woman named Mia escapes from a country at war by hiding in a maritime container aboard a cargo ship. After a violent storm, Mia gives birth to the child while lost at sea, where she must fight to survive.

recommendations.title: American Heist
recommendations.overview: Two brothers, both with troubled paths, find themselves in the middle of one last bank job.

recommendations.title: Furie
recommendations.overview: When a little girl is kidnapped by a trafficking ring, they soon find they messed with the wrong child. Her mother, a notorious former gang leader, is close on their trail and will go to any lengths to bring her child home.
